_comment: SLICE 4 (2026-07-02) — the AMBIGUOUS arm of the conditionalized handoff pickup planner (#412, commit c1a66f4d). Sibling of pickup.spec.json (the CLEAR arm, RCF=[workflow-trigger.md]). This scenario's prompt is a generic pickup ('resume from the current state') carrying a task directive ('start the next workflow') to bypass the chunker into pickup intent, with NO clearly-pinned task, against a handoff with >=2 plausible Next Session pickups. plan_handoff_run.py therefore emits BOTH workflow-trigger.md AND continuation-sequence.md as required reads, so the floor requires both. FALSIFIABLE: an ambiguous pickup that skips continuation-sequence.md fails. Proven by a fresh operator-authorized ask-before-run capture (bundle charness-artifacts/cautilus/handoff-pickup-ambiguous-slice4-2026-07-02). thresholds omitted until a baseline capture sets a budget.
prompt: /charness:handoff resume from the current state and start the next workflow before doing anything else

adapter-contract.md.rationale: The planner reads this only when the adapter is missing, warned, or invalid; a healthy repo resolves the artifact location from the resolved adapter without opening the explainer doc.
adapter-contract.md.trigger: adapter is missing, warned, or invalid (planner _required_reads condition)

chunked-routing.md.rationale: A chunked_routing-intent planner read; not opened on a pickup run that carries a task directive.
chunked-routing.md.trigger: bare/namespaced invocation with no task directive — route the backlog before pickup

continuation-sequence.md.rationale: A pickup-intent CONDITIONAL planner required read that IS forced here: this scenario is an AMBIGUOUS pickup (generic resume + a task directive to bypass the chunker, no pinned task, >=2 plausible pickups), so plan_handoff_run.py emits continuation-sequence.md to order the plausible pickups. A faithful ambiguous pickup opens it; skipping it is a genuine floor MISS.

spill-targets.md.rationale: A refresh-intent planner read; not opened on a pickup run.
spill-targets.md.trigger: refresh intent — spilling durable detail to its owning artifact instead of growing a diary

state-selection.md.rationale: A refresh/judge-intent planner read; not opened on a pickup run.
state-selection.md.trigger: refresh intent — keeping only state that changes the next action

workflow-trigger.md.rationale: A pickup-intent UNCONDITIONAL planner required read: a pickup starts from the named workflow trigger, so the run must consult this to invoke the next workflow directly rather than infer it.
